scripts.electron:dev: wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npm run compile && VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 npx electron .
scripts.compile: tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && mv dist-electron/electron/preload.js dist-electron/electron/preload.cjs
scripts.build: vite build && npm run compile && electron-builder
